reading.title: Reading: An interview profile
reading.passage: She works in a small office downtown. She starts work at eight o'clock. She lives with her parents and goes to work by bus. At work, she answers phone calls and writes reports.

questions.question: She goes to work by car.
What does she do at work?
questions.explanation: "she answers phone calls and writes reports."

reading.title: Reading: A disagreement
reading.passage: I disagree. I think the answer is wrong. The number doesn't match the question. I don't avoid mistakes, but I refuse to guess. He never eats fast food, and he rarely watches TV.

questions.question: The writer thinks the answer is correct.
questions.explanation: "I disagree. I think the answer is wrong."
